steps.title: Choose two points on the line
steps.content: Two clear points on the line of best fit are approximately $(0,25)$ and $(80,11)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content:
Use change in temperature divided by change in depth:
$$m=\frac{11-25}{80-0}=\frac{-14}{80}=-0.175$$

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The listed value closest to $-0.175$ is $-0.17$. The answer is D.
